name: Rogaland (Norway)

colors.symbolism: the field of the county arms

description: A blue field charged with a stylised silver eight-armed cross derived from a Viking Age stone cross.
history: Adopted by Rogaland county on 19 March 1987. Rogaland survived the 2020 county reorganisation and continues unchanged today.

features.symbolism: drawn from an Iron Age / Viking Age stone cross at Tjora; symbolises Rogaland's deep history
